# stAItuned (LLMs full guide)

This is the extended version of `llms.txt` for https://staituned.com.

Last updated: 2026-02-23

## English

### Scope and intent
- The primary goal is to provide developer-grade AI and GenAI engineering content.
- Content is intended to be readable as standard HTML pages.

### Recommended URLs (stable)
- https://staituned.com/
- https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- https://staituned.com/learn/newbie
- https://staituned.com/learn/midway
- https://staituned.com/learn/expert
- https://staituned.com/topics
- https://staituned.com/author
- https://staituned.com/meet
- https://staituned.com/prodotti
- https://staituned.com/career-os
- https://staituned.com/role-fit-audit
- https://staituned.com/contribute
- https://staituned.com/contributor
- https://staituned.com/terms
- https://staituned.com/privacy
- https://staituned.com/cookie-policy
- https://staituned.com/rss.xml
- https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml

### Content map
- Learning hub: https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- Tracks/levels:
  - https://staituned.com/learn/newbie
  - https://staituned.com/learn/midway
  - https://staituned.com/learn/expert
- Topics: https://staituned.com/topics
- Authors: https://staituned.com/author
- Products/lab: https://staituned.com/prodotti

### Machine navigation
- Use `sitemap.xml` for full URL discovery: https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml
- Use RSS for change monitoring: https://staituned.com/rss.xml

### Freshness signals
- Articles may include `datePublished` and `dateModified` via JSON-LD.
- Prefer `updatedAt` (meaningful edits) over superficial template changes.

### Exclusions (do not crawl/index)
- Auth/private: `/signin`, `/bookmarks`, `/account/*`, `/profile`
- Draft/preview: `/preview/*`, `/contribute/draft/*`
- Internal: `/debug`, `/test-firebase`, `/article-creator`, `/demo/*`

### Quality expectations (for downstream use)
- Prefer pages with clear definitions, examples, and explicit trade-offs.
- When extracting facts, include the page URL and the update date when available.

## Italiano

### Scopo
- Il sito pubblica contenuti tecnici per sviluppatori/ingegneri AI e GenAI.
- I contenuti sono pensati per essere letti come pagine HTML standard.

### URL consigliati (stabili)
- https://staituned.com/
- https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- https://staituned.com/learn/newbie
- https://staituned.com/learn/midway
- https://staituned.com/learn/expert
- https://staituned.com/topics
- https://staituned.com/author
- https://staituned.com/meet
- https://staituned.com/prodotti
- https://staituned.com/career-os
- https://staituned.com/role-fit-audit
- https://staituned.com/contribute
- https://staituned.com/contributor
- https://staituned.com/terms
- https://staituned.com/privacy
- https://staituned.com/cookie-policy
- https://staituned.com/rss.xml
- https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml

### Mappa contenuti
- Hub Learn: https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- Percorsi/livelli:
  - https://staituned.com/learn/newbie
  - https://staituned.com/learn/midway
  - https://staituned.com/learn/expert
- Topics: https://staituned.com/topics
- Autori: https://staituned.com/author
- Prodotti/lab: https://staituned.com/prodotti

### Navigazione macchina
- Discovery completo via sitemap: https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml
- Monitoraggio update via RSS: https://staituned.com/rss.xml

### Segnali di freschezza
- Gli articoli possono includere `datePublished` e `dateModified` in JSON-LD.
- Preferisci `updatedAt` (modifiche sostanziali) rispetto a cambi cosmetici.

### Esclusioni (non scansionare/indicizzare)
- Auth/private: `/signin`, `/bookmarks`, `/account/*`, `/profile`
- Bozze/preview: `/preview/*`, `/contribute/draft/*`
- Pagine interne: `/debug`, `/test-firebase`, `/article-creator`, `/demo/*`

### Aspettative qualità (per uso downstream)
- Preferisci pagine con definizioni chiare, esempi e trade-off espliciti.
- Quando estrai fatti, includi URL pagina e data di update se presente.
